products.name: 100FX
products.description:
STYLE 100FX is an expanded flexible pure graphite fibre (purity 99% minimum) braided packing reinforced with non metallic filament. The packing is extrusion resistant and capable of withstanding higher pressure both in dynamic and static condition.

STYLE 100FX packing is also impregnated with proprietary hi-therm dispersion to fill the leak paths between the braids. Under gland pressure it becomes a homogeneous mass.
advantages: Self generating lubrication accommodates and aids self adjustment on stem upon tighting of gland
Most effective sealing performance & no scoring of sleeve, plunger or stem
Hi-therm lubrication developed by us, in-house R & D prevents the body and shaft leakage on static or dynamic equipment
Suits for high mechanical & cylindrical load
Excellent sealing during long duration

products.name: 501C
products.description:
501C is a specially developed hybrid combination packing of Non-Metallic Expanded Pure Graphite yarn reinforced with high structural Carbon filament at core, four corners and carrier. The packing is impregnated with proprietary THERMOLUBE Graphite based dispersion and also INORGANIC PASSIVE CORROSION INHIBITOR. This Passive Corrosion Inhibitor safeguards parent equipment from Galvanic Corrosion and also reduction of LOSS ON IGNITION.

501C is a combination of softness of Expanded Pure Graphite and Toughness of Carbon fibre yarn. The packing is highly Chemical resistant and very good Thermal Conductor. This can be used both in dynamic & Static application.
advantages: Excellent dry run capabilities and hence reduce continuous water flashing
Incorporation of corrosion inhibitor prevents corrosion and pitting on parent equipment
THERMOLUBE dispersion acts as a blocking agent
The packing adopts to worn out surface and pitting with smooth running
Dissipates heat without chemical hardening
applications: Pumps, Valves, Autoclaves, Converters, Mixers, Reactors, etc.

products.name: CG 101
products.description:
CG 101 is a high-performance packing manufactured from carbon filament yarn. It is impregnated with a thermally cured graphite-based in-therm dispersion, which acts as a blocking agent and further reduces stem friction. This packing is designed to prevent leakage of gaseous or liquid materials. Additionally, it incorporates a passive corrosion inhibitor to prevent galvanic corrosion.

Adequate lubrication allows for extremely low friction runs, making it strong yet pliable without brittleness. The packing also provides excellent heat dissipation for cooler shaft runs, ensuring superior sealing services.
features: The packing is thoroughly impregnated with graphite-based in-therm dispersion, ensuring minimal gaps or voids. This impregnation contributes to its exceptional friction-free runs even in high endurance
When compressed, the packing forms a tight barrier, effectively preventing fluid leakage
It is designed to withstand high-pressure conditions. Its robust materials and construction make it suitable for applications where pressure levels are significant

It boasts wide chemical resistance and handles various corrosive substances, including acids, alkalis, solvents, organic chemicals, gases, steam, and thermic fluids, without compromising its sealing properties
Additionally, its abrasion resistance ensures longevity, even in demanding industrial settings
The packing material penetrates well into irregular surfaces, conforming closely to the equipment it seals
This property enhances its sealing effectiveness and minimizes the risk of leaks
advantages: Resistant to a wide range of chemicals, including acids, alkalis, solvents, gases, and steam
Excellent heat dissipation for cooler shaft runs, ensuring superior sealing services
Strong yet pliable without brittleness, providing durability and flexibility
Low oxidation rate and long service life in high-temperature applications
Suitable for both dynamic and static applications
Fire-safe design for use in inflammable applications

products.name: CG 102
products.description:
CG 102 is crafted from premium expanded graphite yarn with 98% carbon content, reinforced with Inconel wire. It is impregnated with proprietary graphite based dispersion and a corrosion inhibitor to protect equipment from galvanic damage. This ensures durability and reliability in high-pressure environments.

The resilient inconel wire enhances structural strength, while the self-lubricating graphite aids stem adjustment during gland tightening. High temperature graphite based lubrication prevents leakage in both static and dynamic equipment, making it ideal for valves, autoclaves, and rotary kilns.
features: Made from expanded graphite yarn with a minimum 98% carbon content, ensuring excellent thermal conductivity and chemical resistance across a wide range of industrial media
Braided with strong yet flexible Inconel wire, the packing maintains structural integrity under high pressure and temperature, with optional multi-wire reinforcement for surge resistance
Developed through in-house R&D, this advanced dispersion prevents leakage and enhances sealing performance in both static and dynamic equipment
The packing generates its own lubrication, allowing smooth stem adjustment during gland tightening and reducing wear on moving parts
Integrated sacrificial metal corrosion inhibitors safeguard equipment from galvanic corrosion, preventing pitting on valve stems and bodies
Safe for use in sensitive environments, as it does not contaminate the media and remains chemically inert
Ideal for use in valves, autoclaves, rotary kilns, and systems handling steam, hydrocarbons, thermic fluids, hot oil, and cooling water
advantages: Exceptional high temperature resistance up to 3315°C in non-oxidizing media
Low oxidation rate ensures long service life in extreme thermal environments
Suitable for rotary and rising-stem valve applications from Class 150 to Class 1500; consult JWI for higher class suitability
Fire-safe design suitable for fire-rated industrial applications
Reinforced with Inconel wire for superior pressure resistance and structural integrity
Self-lubricating graphite aids stem adjustment and reduces wear during operation
Corrosion inhibitor prevents galvanic corrosion, protecting valve stems and bodies

products.name: CG 503
products.description:
CG 503 is a high-performance packing made from expanded graphite and carbon fibre yarn, ideal for high-pressure and high-temperature valves. Its core is reinforced with Inconel wire and jacketed with fine mesh, while the outer layer uses low-friction carbon yarn. This design ensures reliable sealing in control valves and soot blower applications.

Enhanced with an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor and proprietary graphite based dispersion, Style CG 503 protects against galvanic corrosion and reduces loss on ignition. It adapts to worn surfaces, dissipates heat efficiently, and allows smooth removal during shutdowns. The packing remains intact when cut, ensuring easy handling and installation.
features: Designed to perform under high temperatures and pressures, making it suitable for critical valve applications
Made from expanded graphite and carbon fibre yarn, reinforced with Inconel wire mesh for enhanced durability and sealing efficiency
Treated with an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor that prevents galvanic corrosion and extends equipment life
Proprietary graphite-based dispersion improves heat dissipation and acts as a sealing enhancer, ensuring consistent performance
Conforms to worn or pitted valve surfaces, maintaining a smooth seal without scoring or damage
The packing remains intact during cutting and allows for smooth removal during shutdowns, reducing maintenance time
Suitable for a broad range of fluids and gases including steam, hydrocarbons, chemicals, ammonia, and thermic fluids
advantages: Exceptional high temperature resistance up to +650°C
Low oxidation rate and long service life in high-temperature and high-pressure environments
Inconel wire reinforcement ensures structural integrity under mechanical and thermal stress
Suitable for both dynamic and static applications Class 150 up to Class 1500. Please consult Inmarco for higher Class range suitability
Graphite based dispersion enhances sealing performance and heat dissipation
Passive corrosion inhibitor protects equipment from galvanic corrosion and reduces loss on ignition

products.name: CG 900
products.description:
Style CG 900 is a premium flexible expanded graphite fiber packing with high carbon content. It is impregnated with proprietary THERMOLUBE dispersion and reinforced with multiple Inconel/SS wires in each strand. The packing also incorporates an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor to safeguard the parent body from galvanic corrosion and reduce loss on ignition.

Style CG 900 is a soft, expanded graphite fiber packing reinforced with resilient multiple Inconel or stainless steel wires. This construction ensures excellent flexibility, making it ideal for wrapping around small-diameter shafts and spindles. The use of special-grade Inconel wire significantly enhances the mechanical strength of the packing, providing superior resistance to pressure surges.
features: Contains Inorganic Passive Corrosion Inhibitor to Prevent Galvanic Corrosion and Reduce Loss on Ignition, ensuring longer service life
Easily wraps around small diameter shafts and spindles without compromising integrity
Inconel wire reinforcement enhances resistance to pressure surges and mechanical stress
Minimal volume loss during operation, preventing premature leakage and extending service life
Automatically adapts during gland tightening, reducing maintenance needs
THERMOLUBE dispersion fills micro-gaps between yarns, ensuring tight sealing
advantages: Ensures dimensional stability under high pressure
Allows flexibility for wrapping around small shafts and spindles
Supports self-adjustment during gland tightening, improving sealing performance
Reduces loss on ignition, preserving packing volume and extending service life
Supports self adjustment during gland tightening improving sealing performance
Offers excellent thermal conductivity and chemical resistance

products.name: ULTRA FE 1003
products.description:
A virtually Zero friction and ultra-low emission Combination Packing Set made from expanded graphite Inconel wire mesh jacketed yarn for end rings and graphite foil ribbon moulded intermediate rings.

The packing is impregnated with a high temperature proprietary emulsion to ensure extremely low friction.

The packing set may be impregnated with an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor to ensure corrosion free performance for prolonged period.

products.name: ULTRA LE 1002
products.description:
Inmarco Ultra LE 1002 is a premium expanded pure graphite (carbon content 99.5 to 99.9%) fiber yarn braided packing, each yarn of which is reinforced with Multiple Inconnel wire, thoroughly incorporated with inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor and special lubricating agents. This Passive Corrosion Inhibitor safeguards parent equipment from Galvanic Corrosion and also reduction of loss on ignition.

Each yarn is jacketed with inconnel wire mesh. The reinforcement and jacketing with inconnel wire meshing each yarn enables the packing to withstand extreme mechanical stress and cyclic loads.
applications:
### Service Media

All Non-Oxidizing liquids and gases, Super-heated and Saturated Steam, Hot dry Ash, Flue gases, Dyes and Chemicals, Emissive fluids, Fuel Oil & Lube Oil, Thermic fluid, Hydrocarbons etc.

products.name: ULTRA LT 1004
products.description:
An Ultra-low friction low emission PTFE combination packing set made from PTFE filament braided intermediate rings with PTFE sintered end rings.

The packing is impregnated with a high temperature proprietary emulsion to ensure extremely low friction even at sub-zero temperature.

products.name: ULTRA NE 1005
products.description: Inmarco ULTRA NE 1005 is an Ultra-low emission, all-braided packing set crafted from expanded graphite yarn jacketed with Inconnel wire mesh. It is impregnated with a proprietary high-temperature emulsion to ensure minimal friction and can be optionally treated with an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor for long-term, corrosion-free performance.

products.name: 504IVC
products.description:
HY 504 is an improved version of duplex braided packing manufactured from Expanded PTFE intimately entrapped with high quality graphite reinforced with high structural carbon fibers. The PTFE graphite yarn is made in single molecular structure. This is a dense packing having high degree of resiliency and chemical properties. Presence of graphite & carbon enables the packing dissipate heat accurately leading to longer life of the packing.

HY 504 is highly anti-frictional and hence able to safeguard shaft/sleeves from wear/erosion. This packing is having excellent resistance to almost all known chemicals and is compatible to wide range of industrial media and is only affected by strong oxidizers, molten alkali metal and fluorine compounds.

HY 504 is dimensionally stable and requires minimum gland loading to effect perfect seal. This is also compatible to very high peripheral speed with extremely low leakage rate. This packing is an excellent resistant to corrosion and abrasion.

products.name: 801CC
products.description:
801CC is a versatile hybrid packing made from non-metallic expanded graphite yarn and carbon filament in unique construction, it is reinforced with high structural carbon filament. It offers exceptional chemical resistance and thermal conductivity.

Impregnated with proprietary high-therm graphite-based dispersion and an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor, this packing protects equipment from galvanic corrosion and reduces loss on ignition. It adapts to surface irregularities, ensuring smooth performance and excellent dry run capabilities.
features: The packing is made from non-metallic expanded graphite yarn, reinforced with high structural carbon filament
The construction has a unique reinforcement of high structural carbon filament to increase strength with enhanced seal-ability
The packing exhibits high chemical resistance and excellent thermal conductivity
It is non-sticky and does not corrode or erode parent equipment, ensuring longevity
Self-lubricating to prevent shaft or stem wear and extend the life of the packing
Unique construction suitable for use across all types of pumps and valves in a plant
Chemically inert, it does not leach out any chemicals during operation, maintaining safety
The packing adapts easily to surface irregularities and conforms to stuffing box dimensions, enhancing its sealing effectiveness
It can be used as an anti-extrusion ring, providing versatility in various applications
advantages: Exceptional chemical resistance to a wide range of media
High thermal conductivity for efficient heat dissipation
Low oxidation rate and long service life
Suitable for both dynamic and static applications
Fire-safe design for use in inflammable applications

products.name: HY 105
products.description:
HY 105 is a high-performance gland packing made from a dense braid of Aramid Yarn corners and PTFE Yarn faces, reinforced with a resilient Aramid fiber core. The materials are treated with advanced lubricants to reduce friction and enhance thermal resistance, ensuring smooth operation and extended service life.

This packing is designed for demanding industrial environments, offering excellent chemical resistance, high pressure tolerance, and dimensional stability. It is ideal for use in pumps, valves, mixers, and reactors across chemical, fertilizer, and process industries.
features: HY 105 is a unique combination of aramid yarn corners and PTFE Yarn faces, designed for enhanced sealing performance
The packing is reinforced with a high-tensile Aramid fiber core, offering exceptional mechanical strength and dimensional stability
PTFE faces are treated with inert, high-temperature lubricants to ensure smooth, low-friction operation
Aramid corners are lubricated with antifrictional fluoropolymer dispersion, preventing corner failures in reciprocating equipment
Developed to deliver reliable sealing in chemically aggressive and mechanically demanding environments
Offers excellent compatibility with a wide range of industrial media including slurries, pigments, and synthetic compounds
Designed for consistent performance in centrifugal, reciprocating, and plunger pump systems
advantages: Engineered for long-lasting sealing performance in dynamic environments
Combines strength and flexibility for consistent dimensional stability
Delivers smooth, low-friction operation to protect equipment surfaces
Designed to perform reliably across a wide range of industrial applications
Constructed with advanced materials for superior chemical and mechanical resistance
applications: Ideal for use in pumps, valves, mixers, and reactors across chemical, fertilizer, and process industries.

products.name: HY 105HD
products.description:
HY 105HD is a dense braided gland packing made with Aramid Yarn corners and PTFE Yarn faces. It includes a high-tensile Aramid fiber core for strength and dimensional stability. Designed for high-pressure and high-temperature environments.

This high-density packing is ideal for critical fertilizer industry applications. Aramid yarn is treated with antifrictional fluoropolymer and break-in lubricant, while PTFE faces use inert, heat-resistant lubricant. This ensures low friction and protects plunger and valve stems.
features: High-Density Braided Construction - The packing is densely braided using Aramid and PTFE yarns, ensuring excellent sealability and dimensional stability under high mechanical stress
Aramid Yarn corners provide structural strength and resistance to corner failures, while PTFE Yarn faces offer low friction and cool shaft operation
Aramid fibers are treated with antifrictional fluoropolymer and break-in lubricant; PTFE faces are lubricated with inert, high-temperature-resistant compounds for smooth performance
Resistant to a broad range of chemicals including ammonia, urea, carbamate condensate, detergents, pigments, and synthetic molten materials used in fertilizer production
PTFE's low-friction properties reduce wear on plungers and valve stems, extending equipment life and reducing maintenance costs
Ideal for use in centrifugal, reciprocating, and plunger pumps, as well as valves, agitators, mixers, extruders, and reactors across various industries
advantages: Exceptional high pressure resistance due to strong Aramid fiber core
Low friction PTFE faces ensure cool shaft operation and reduced wear
High-density braided construction for superior sealability and dimensional stability
Wide chemical compatibility including ammonia, urea, and carbamate solutions
Suitable for reciprocating, centrifugal, and plunger pumps in fertilizer applications
Operates effectively across a wide temperature range
Designed for critical applications in the fertilizer industry with reliable performance
applications: Ideal for critical fertilizer industry applications, particularly in centrifugal, reciprocating, and plunger pumps, as well as valves, agitators, mixers, extruders, and reactors.

products.name: HY 105T
products.description:
HY 105T is a high-performance gland packing made from Aldehyde Yarn corners and PTFE Yarn faces, reinforced with a resilient PTFE cord core. Its dense braided construction ensures excellent strength, dimensional stability, and sealing capability under extreme conditions. This makes it ideal for pumps, valves, mixers, and reactors.

The packing is lubricated with advanced fluoropolymer and inert compounds, reducing friction and wear during operation. It handles a wide range of aggressive media like ammonia, urea, carbamate, and dry abrasives. With high pressure resistance and broad chemical compatibility, it excels in fertilizer, chemical, and paint industries.
features: Combines Aldehyde Yarn corners with PTFE Yarn faces and a high-tensile PTFE cord core, delivering superior mechanical strength and sealing performance
Withstands pressures up to 500 bar, making it ideal for high-pressure applications in pumps, valves, and reactors
PTFE fibers and specialized lubricants reduce friction, ensuring cooler shaft runs and minimizing wear on plungers and valve stems
Resistant to a wide range of aggressive media including ammonia, urea, carbamate, detergents, pigments, and synthetic materials
Performs reliably in dry, abrasive, and corrosive environments, extending service life even under harsh operating conditions
Suitable for centrifugal, reciprocating, and plunger pumps, as well as agitators, mixers, extruders, and more
Dense braided structure ensures excellent sealability and dimensional stability, reducing the risk of leakage or packing failure
advantages: Exceptional high-pressure resistance
Low friction operation ensures minimal wear on shafts and plungers
Excellent chemical compatibility with ammonia, urea, carbamate, and more
Dense braided construction provides superior seal integrity and dimensional stability
Suitable for centrifugal, reciprocating, and plunger pumps, as well as valves and mixers
Performs reliably in dry, abrasive, and corrosive environments
Lubricated with high-temperature inert compounds for extended service life
applications: Ideal for use in pumps, valves, mixers, and reactors in fertilizer, chemical, and paint industries.

products.name: HY 107
products.description:
HY 107 is a unique multi yarn packing designed for harsh applications having Aramid filament yarn at the corners and PTFE graphited yarn at the faces having core of Aramid filament.

This packing provides low friction due to graphite lubricated PTFE faces but ensures resistance to abrasion with tough Aramid filament at the corner.

These features contribute to its ability to deliver extended, leak-free performance. Whether in demanding industrial applications or critical sealing scenarios, this packing material ensures reliability and longevity.
features: The packing exhibits a dense construction, ensuring minimal gaps or voids. This density contributes to its exceptional sealability
When compressed, the packing forms a tight barrier, effectively preventing fluid leakage
It is designed to withstand high pressure conditions. Its robust materials and construction make it suitable for applications where pressure levels are significant
Whether in pumps, valves, or other equipment, this packing maintains its integrity even under substantial pressure
A standout feature of this packing is its extreme durability when exposed to Ammonia and Carbamate solutions
It boasts wide chemical resistance and handles various corrosive substances without compromising its sealing properties
Additionally, its abrasion resistance ensures longevity, even in demanding industrial settings
The packing material penetrates well into irregular surfaces, conforming closely to the equipment it seals
This property enhances its sealing effectiveness and minimizes the risk of leaks
advantages: Excellent abrasion resistance
Superior compression and recovery characteristics with out-of-true shafts and spindles
Excellent extrusion resistance
Low shaft wear
Packing is tested and qualified as per EN16752 (Centrifugal pumps test procedure for seal packing), tightness class T2
applications: Suitable for use in pumps, valves, and other equipment in demanding industrial applications and critical sealing scenarios.

products.name: HY 107HD
products.description:
HY 107HD is a high-density combination packing made with Aramid Fibre Yarn at the corners and PTFE Graphite Yarn at the faces, reinforced with an Aramid core. It is treated with antifrictional fluoropolymer dispersion and a special break-in lubricant. This design ensures excellent chemical resistance, dimensional stability, and thermal control.

The graphite-faced surface promotes efficient heat dissipation, while the Aramid corners enhance structural integrity under pressure. Its compact construction supports long-term sealing performance in high-pressure, high-temperature environments.
features: High-Density Construction - Densely braided for superior sealability and structural integrity, ideal for high-pressure sealing environments
Designed for Critical Fertilizer Applications - Specifically engineered for use in fertilizer plants, especially in carbamate and urea pump systems, where reliability is essential
Aramid Fibre Yarn at the corners provides mechanical strength, while PTFE Graphite Yarn at the faces ensures smooth operation and thermal control
Impregnated with antifrictional fluoropolymer dispersion and break-in lubricant to minimize startup wear and extend service life
Withstands harsh chemicals and abrasive media, ensuring long-term durability in demanding industrial conditions
Graphite-faced surfaces enhance heat dissipation, allowing cooler operation and reducing thermal stress on equipment
Aramid corners prevent deformation and failure in reciprocating motion, maintaining consistent sealing under dynamic loads
advantages: Exceptional high-density construction for reliable sealing under high pressure
Engineered for critical operations in fertilizer plants, including carbamate and urea pump systems
Dual-yarn design with Aramid corners and PTFE Graphite faces for enhanced durability and thermal control
Low wear during startup due to antifrictional fluoropolymer and break-in lubricant treatment
Excellent resistance to chemical attack and abrasive media, ensuring long service life
applications: Specifically engineered for use in fertilizer plants, especially in carbamate and urea pump systems. Suitable for high-pressure, high-temperature environments requiring reliable sealing performance.

products.name: HY 120AR
products.description: STYLE 120AR is a premium grade economical packing manufactured from Aramid yarn in the core & corner all four faces from Ramie fiber packing with a highly tenacious synthetic reinforcement which enhances the tensile strength, increase operational life of packing. This packing is dispersed with pure PTFE and does excellent sealing in stern tubes.
features: Highest quality Ramie Fibre with Aramid reinforcement
Better mechanical strength
Excellent lubrication leading to minimal shaft wear
Special water absorption capabilities of Ramie fibre enhance the sealing capabilities
applications: Rudder shaft sealing, Water handling equipment, etc.

products.name: HY 501
products.description:
HY 501 is a versatile hybrid packing made from Non-Metallic Expanded Pure Graphite yarn. It is impregnated with proprietary Graphite-based dispersion and an INORGANIC PASSIVE CORROSION INHIBITOR. This combination ensures excellent chemical resistance, thermal conductivity, and protection against galvanic corrosion.

The packing adapts to surface irregularities, ensuring smooth performance and excellent dry run capabilities. It is chemically inert, self-lubricating, and suitable for use across pumps and valves.
advantages: Exceptional chemical resistance to a wide range of media
High thermal conductivity for efficient heat dissipation
Low oxidation rate and long service life
Suitable for both dynamic and static applications Class 150 up to Class 1500. Please consult Inmarco for higher Class range suitability
Fire-safe design for use in fire-rated applications

products.name: HY 510EC
products.description:
Style HY 510EC is a high-performance hybrid packing designed for demanding industrial and marine applications. It is made from PTFE-based fibers with graphite in the molecular structure and Aramid reinforcement, and features a hollow elastomer core that provides enhanced resiliency. This advanced construction ensures reliable sealing and a long service life, particularly in seawater applications.

The packing offers excellent sealing performance and an optimized mechanical design for marine service conditions. Its specialized structure supports consistent operation under harsh environments, delivering durability, stability, and dependable leak-free performance in critical applications.
advantages: Adequate lubrication for low friction runs
No embrittlement or abrasion to parent equipment
Graphite Inblend controls the thermal expansion of PTFE by around 20%, eliminating chances of overheating and extrusion
Excellent heat dissipation to ensure cool run and thus guarantee excellent sealing performance
Hollow elastomer core ensures excellent resiliency
applications: Pumps, agitators, dryers, mixers, reactor shafts, stern tubes, and similar rotating equipment.

products.name: HY 606
products.description:
HY 606 is a high-performance packing made from abrasion-resistant Aldehyde fibre yarn. It is impregnated with PTFE-based Inflon dispersion and treated with break-in and run-in lubricants. These additives reduce friction and protect sleeves and shafts from erosion.

The packing's core of Red Inmalon yarn adds resilience and structural strength. Its tough construction ensures dimensional stability and resistance to deformation, making it ideal for demanding industrial operations.
advantages: Exceptional resistance to high temperatures and thermal stress
Low friction performance due to advanced PTFE-based lubrication
Suitable for both rotary and reciprocating equipment in tough conditions
Resilient core construction ensures long-lasting structural integrity
Maintains dimensional stability under mechanical and thermal loads
Available in a wide range of sizes for diverse industrial applications
Designed for reliable sealing in high-pressure and high-speed operations

products.name: HY801
products.description:
HY801 is a versatile hybrid packing made from Non-Metallic Expanded Pure Graphite yarn, reinforced with high structural Carbon filament. It offers exceptional chemical resistance and thermal conductivity.

Impregnated with proprietary THERMOLUBE Graphite-based dispersion and an INORGANIC PASSIVE CORROSION INHIBITOR, this packing protects equipment from galvanic corrosion and reduces loss on ignition. It adapts to surface irregularities, ensuring smooth performance and excellent dry run capabilities.
advantages: Exceptional chemical resistance to a wide range of media
High thermal conductivity for efficient heat dissipation
Low oxidation rate and long service life
Suitable for both dynamic and static applications Class 150 up to Class 1500. Please consult Inmarco for higher Class range suitability
Fire-safe design for use in fire-rated applications

products.name: REBACKLON 175
products.description:
STYLE REBACKLON 175 is a combination of duplex braided packing with inmalon yarn and expanded PTFE intimately bonded with special quality graphite yarn incorporating break-in-lubricant in a special process. This is a dense packing having high degree of resiliency and chemical properties.

STYLE REBACKLON 175 the presence of graphite enables the packing dissipate heat accurately leading to longer life of the packing. The break-in-lubricant ensures extra lubrication during the complete operational life.

STYLE REBACKLON 175 is highly anti-frictional and hence able to safeguard shaft/sleeves from wear/erosion. This packing is having excellent resistance to almost all known chemicals and is compatible to wide range of industrial media and is only affected by strong oxidizers, molten alkali metal, fluorine compounds, concentrated fuming acids.

STYLE REBACKLON 175 is suitable for dynamic as well as static application. As it is dimensionally stable it ensures leakage free operational life for a longer period.
features: Combination of duplex braided packing with inmalon yarn and expanded PTFE intimately bonded with special quality graphite yarn
Incorporates break-in-lubricant in a special process for extra lubrication during complete operational life
Dense packing with high degree of resiliency and chemical properties
Presence of graphite enables accurate heat dissipation leading to longer packing life
Highly anti-frictional, safeguarding shaft/sleeves from wear/erosion
Excellent resistance to almost all known chemicals
Compatible with wide range of industrial media
Only affected by strong oxidizers, molten alkali metal, fluorine compounds, concentrated fuming acids
Dimensionally stable ensuring leakage free operational life for longer period
Suitable for dynamic as well as static applications

products.description: STYLE 120 is a special developed ramie fibre packing with a highly tenacious synthetic reinforcement which enhances the tensile strength, increases operational life of packing. This packing is dispersed with pure PTFE and does excellent sealing in stern tubes.
advantages: Proprietary Inflon dispersion enhances the density and the sealing ability. Safe & stays clean under operation.
Highest quality Ramie Fibre with Aramid reinforcement.
Comparatively better mechanical strength.
Excellent lubrication leading to minimal shaft wear.
Special water absorption capabilities of Ramie fibre enhance the sealing capabilities.
applications: Stern tubes, Water handling equipment, etc.

products.name: OR 125
products.description:
OR 125 is a premium-grade packing made from high-strength acrylic fiber. It is impregnated with proprietary PTFE based dispersion, enhancing its chemical resistance and sealing performance. The packing offers excellent mechanical integrity and durability.

Its advanced composition ensures minimal shaft wear and superior lubrication. Designed for consistent performance, Style OR 125 is an economical and efficient solution for various industrial sealing needs.
features: Impregnated with proprietary PTFE based dispersion, the packing offers superior resistance to a wide range of chemicals, ensuring long-term reliability in challenging environments.
Braided from strong acrylic fibers, it offers superior durability and tensile strength compared to traditional natural or vegetable fiber-based packings.
The PTFE treatment provides smooth lubrication, reducing friction and minimizing wear on shafts and other moving components.
The advanced impregnation process increases packing density, resulting in better sealing efficiency and reduced leakage under pressure.
Designed to balance performance and affordability, it serves as a reliable choice for industrial sealing without compromising on quality.
The packing maintains its integrity across a wide temperature range, ensuring consistent sealing performance even under fluctuating thermal conditions.
Designed to perform safely in clean water systems, it minimizes contamination and supports hygienic operation in sensitive environments.
advantages: Enhanced sealing density through proprietary PTFE dispersion.
Excellent lubrication ensures minimal shaft wear and longer equipment life.
Superior mechanical strength compared to natural and vegetable fiber packings.
Safe for use in clean water systems and mild chemical environments.
Economical design suitable for general-purpose industrial sealing.
Maintains performance across a wide temperature range up to 260°C.

products.name: OR 125G
products.description: STYLE OR 125G is a premium grade economical packing braided from extremely strong acrylic fiber and further impregnated with graphite based intherm dispersion which is for better heat dissipation.
advantages: Proprietary inflon/intherm dispersion enhances the density and sealing ability.
Safe and stays under clean water application.
Comparatively better mechanical strength as against natural and vegetable fibers.
Excellent lubrication leading to minimal shaft wear.
An economical choice for fluid handling equipment.
Intherm dispersion enhances the thermal conductivity of the packing.

products.name: OR 125SR
products.description:
OR 125SR is a high-performance packing solution designed for industrial sealing applications. It features a silicon rubber core that enhances elasticity, compression recovery, and sealing adaptability under dynamic conditions. Braided from high-strength acrylic fibers and treated with proprietary PTFE based dispersion, it ensures excellent chemical resistance and mechanical integrity.

The advanced composition minimizes shaft wear, improves sealing density, and reduces leakage under pressure. OR 125 SR performs reliably across a wide temperature range. It is ideal for clean water systems, mild chemical environments, and general-purpose industrial use.
features: The integrated silicon rubber core enhances the packing's ability to recover after compression, ensuring a tight seal even under fluctuating pressure and dynamic conditions.
Impregnated with proprietary PTFE dispersion, OR 125 SR resists a wide range of chemicals, making it suitable for aggressive media and extending service life.
The outer structure is braided from durable acrylic fibers, offering superior tensile strength and mechanical integrity compared to traditional fiber-based packings.
PTFE treatment provides smooth lubrication, reducing friction and minimizing shaft wear, which helps in maintaining equipment efficiency and longevity.
The combination of PTFE and silicon rubber increases packing density, improving sealing performance and reducing leakage under high pressure.
Designed for hygienic applications, it minimizes contamination and is safe for use in clean water systems and mild chemical processes.
advantages: Enhanced sealing density through hollow elastomar core & proprietary PTFE dispersion.
Excellent lubrication ensures minimal shaft wear and longer equipment life.
Superior mechanical strength compared to natural and vegetable fiber packings.
Safe for use in clean water systems and mild chemical environments.
Economical design suitable for general-purpose industrial sealing.
Maintains performance across a wide temperature range up to 260°C.

products.name: PE 102
products.description:
PE 102 is an inter-braided packing made from expanded PTFE and graphite fiber. This molecular blend offers excellent chemical resistance, reduced friction, and enhanced heat conduction. It ensures superior sealing performance compared to conventional PTFE graphite packings.

The packing uses K-fibre from WL Gore Inc., with graphite blended during polymerisation for structural integrity. This prevents disintegration, maintains lubrication, and supports long-term use. Ideal for pumps without cooling water, it delivers unmatched reliability and efficiency.
features: With a unique PTFE and graphite blend, it withstands a wide range of corrosive media including acids, alkalis, and organic chemicals.
Graphite integration improves heat dissipation, allowing equipment to run cooler and more efficiently under high temperatures.
The packing minimizes friction against shafts and sleeves, reducing wear and extending equipment life.
Exhibits low thermal expansion, maintaining consistent sealing performance even in fluctuating temperature conditions.
Prevents static charge build-up, making it safe for use in sensitive chemical and hydrocarbon environments.
Graphite is molecularly bonded during polymerisation, ensuring continuous lubrication and preventing hardening over time.
Flexible and easy to cut, it simplifies fitting and maintenance, reducing downtime and labor costs.
applications: Exceptional resistance to a wide range of chemicals including acids, alkali, and hydrocarbons.

TYPE SST 323 the flexible pure graphite sheet is having 99% to 99.9%. These are extremely suitable for high temperature and high pressure application. These gaskets are highly resilient and as such easily adopts to irregularities of flange or surface to make perfect seal. SS tanged gaskets are suitable for metallic, glass, enamel flanges and are designed for trouble free change over which ultimately reduces maintenance cost. products.description: INMATEX EXPANDED PTFE (ePTFE) SHEET / GASKET WITH EXCEPTIONAL MALLEABILITY FOR EXTREME OPERATING CONDITION. With exceptionally uniform density and highly fibrillated micro structure (no unexpanded nodes), INMATEX multi-directional expanded PTFE (ePTFE) sheet/gasket has excellent resistance to pressure, creep relaxation, cold flow. It is made of 100% virgin PTFE. It is extremely soft but tough and highly compressible. It is non-staining and non-contaminating and one of the highest resistance to aggressive media, best in-class reliability as to seal flange joints and piping equipments.

products.name: NA 320
products.description: TYPE FG 320 is manufactured from exfoliated graphite. After this, the whole process of manufacturing flexible graphite gasket sheet is mechanical, without incorporation of any additives, oils or bonding material. TYPE FG 320 flexible pure graphite sheet is having carbon content 99% to 99.9%. These are extremely suitable for high temperature and high pressure application. These gaskets are highly resilient and as such easily adopts to irregularities of flange or surface to make perfect seal. Inmarco flexible pure graphite gaskets are suitable for metallic, glass, enamel flanges and are designed for trouble free change over which ultimately reduces maintenance cost. PTFE is not inflammable and highly stable at normal operating temperature of 250°C. It has low friction and high release properties. Easy to machine cut or mould. It has good electrical insulation properties.

products.name: GM 300Z
products.description:
GM 300Z is a high-efficiency, ultra-low oxidation, graphite-molded rings for valve stem and seat sealing. Each ring is made from flexible graphite foil with high purity (≥99.85%) and low detrimental material content. These rings have oxidation inhibitors and advanced corrosion-resistant properties, meeting stringent nuclear industry specifications. They are precisely sized, density-controlled, and free from binders, elastomers, or any fillers.

It is specifically designed for demanding valve operating conditions in the nuclear sector and high temperature application where high graphite purity and low sulfur content are essential.
applications: Suitable for all types of valves that handle high-temperature steam, heat transfer media, hydrocarbon and a wide range of other nuclear power generation liquids and gases
Nuclear sector applications with demanding valve operating conditions
High temperature applications where high graphite purity and low sulfur content are essential

products.name: GM 310C
products.description:
GM 310C is graphite pressure seal rings are made from very high purity graphite ribbon without any additives and are used in pressure seal valves. SS/Inconel end caps on top and bottom ensure extrusion resistance. This comes in varied construction ranging from rectangular, angular (u-shape, I-shape) construction to meet various industrial needs.

The unique design ensures extreme extrusion resistance without compromising sealing performance. Low detrimental material content enables virtually no decomposition even at high temperature. The gasket exhibits extremely low oxidation at elevated temperature.
applications:
All non-oxidizing liquids and gases, super heated and saturated steam, hot dry ash, flue gases, dyes and chemicals, emissive fluids, fuel oil and lube oil, thermal fluid, hydrocarbons etc.

**Specific Applications:** Pressure seal valves

products.description:

products.name: 750 SS - Special Silica Fabric / Welding Blanket
products.description:
STYLE 750 SS is a heavy duty fabric woven by high SiO2 content yarn with specially formulated Acid treatment. This Silica cloth is suitable for continuous use at 2000 °F (1100 °C), and able to withstand short term exposure 2550 °F (1400 °C). Additional Polyurethane coating or Vermiculite coating will enhance the fabrics unmatched abrasion resistance and tensile strength.

STYLE 750 SS is ideal for heat preservation material, firefighting equipment like Fire curtains, Welding Blankets & Fireproof garments. Very good in dust collection and filtration equipment where special material is needed to withstand high temperature gas, and in filtering high temperature liquid metal.

STYLE 750 SS is ideal to make preformed Fire & Welding Blankets all side stitched with Fiber Glass Tape having Brass Eyelets at 1 Mtr distance.
applications: Style 750 SS Silica fabrics withstand Welding Spark, Cutting Spatter, Molten Metal etc.
Style 750 SS Silica fabrics are used as high temperature insulation.
Applications include molten metal splash, valve covers & curtain materials.
Thermal protection for different branches of technique, namely for Refractorywoundings, Gaskets, blankets.
Excessive heat for manufacture of filters used for cleaning of the corrosive medium.
Style 750 SS Silica fabric is Electrically and Thermally insulating.
